description: English criminal organization based in Clerkenwell, London, founded in the 1980s by Terry Adams and his brothers Tommy and Patrick. Allegedly one of the most powerful in the UK, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, gold bullion hijacking, and security fraud. Linked to 25 gangland murders and connections with South American drug cartels. Influence reportedly decreased from 2000 onwards.

country_links.evidence_quote: gaining an $80 million credit line from Colombian drug cartels
country_links.context: The syndicate has connections with Colombian drug cartels, including an $80 million credit line.

country_links.evidence_quote: were arrested in Amsterdam on 7 August 2015
country_links.context: Patrick Adams was arrested in Amsterdam for an attempted murder.

country_links.evidence_quote: two of his brothers are under surveillance by the Serious Organised Crime Agency and police in Spain
country_links.context: The syndicate's members are under surveillance by police in Spain, and Tommy Adams lives there.
